function.name: render
function.description: Render a PHP template string and return the output as a string.

param.name: ctx
param.description: Holds template variables and optional output filters

function.name: render_file
function.description: Load a .php template from disk and render it.

param.name: ctx
param.description: Holds template variables and optional output filters

function.name: php_to_python
function.description: Translate a snippet of PHP code to equivalent Python.

param.name: code
param.description: Raw PHP code string (without template tags)

class.name: Context
class.description: Holds the variables and filters passed to a template.

attr.name: vars
attr.description: Template variables, accessed as PHP variables inside templates

attr.name: filters
attr.description: Named post-processing functions for output expressions

class.name: E
class.description: Wraps an xml.etree.ElementTree.Element for dot-access of attributes in templates.

attr.name: (any XML attribute)
attr.description: Read directly as a property: el->name, el->type, etc.
